kimi.verification_method: Live hooks captured on 2026-07-19 from a sanitized empty workspace via temporary [[hooks]] rules in ~/.kimi-code/config.toml (backup restored afterwards); raw payloads remained outside the repository.

field_availability.session_id: present on every observed event; resume keeps the same session_id
field_availability.workspace_root: unavailable; derive the workspace from cwd
field_availability.transcript_path: unavailable on every observed hook payload; ~/.kimi-code/session_index.jsonl maps sessionId to sessionDir, whose agents/main/wire.jsonl carries content.part think/text blocks as a best-effort transcript side channel
field_availability.model: unavailable on every observed hook payload
field_availability.tool_input: present on PreToolUse, PostToolUse, and PostToolUseFailure
field_availability.tool_result: present on PostToolUse as the tool_output string
field_availability.failure_details: PostToolUseFailure carries an error object {code, message, retryable}; a non-zero shell exit is reported this way
field_availability.compact_summary: unavailable as a body; compact hooks expose trigger and token counts only (auto trigger live-observed 2026-07-19; manual /compact not probed)
field_availability.subagent_parent_id: no dedicated field; the Agent tool's Pre/PostToolUse tool_call_id correlates parent and child, and Agent PostToolUse tool_output begins with an agent_id line

SessionStart.note: source=startup|resume; resume re-fires with the same session_id (idempotent start required); no model field

UserPromptSubmit.note: prompt is a content-block array [{type,text}], not a plain string

PreToolUse.note: tool_name, tool_input, and tool_call_id correlate with PostToolUse; Agent calls carry tool_input.subagent_type

PostToolUse.note: tool_output is a plain string; Agent tool_output starts with an agent_id line

PostToolUseFailure.note: error is an object {code, message, retryable}; a non-zero shell exit arrives here, not in PostToolUse

Stop.note: Only stop_hook_active is present; transcript text must come from the session wire.jsonl side channel

SessionEnd.note: reason=exit on print-mode close; unlike Grok Build, Kimi Code emits a true session-end signal

SubagentStart.note: agent_name and a plain-string prompt but no correlation ids; subagent start is captured from PreToolUse(Agent), which carries the correlating tool_call_id instead

SubagentStop.note: agent_name and the subagent's full response string

Notification.note: task.completed notifications fire with title/body/source_kind; no Traceary lifecycle mapping planned

PreCompact.note: trigger=auto with token_count; no summary body is exposed. Manual /compact was not probed (TUI-only)

PostCompact.note: trigger=auto with estimated_token_count; no summary body is exposed. Manual /compact was not probed (TUI-only)

Interrupt.note: interactive Esc only; not exercised by the headless probe

StopFailure.note: no API failure was intentionally induced in the live probe

PermissionRequest.note: print mode auto-approves, so no approval wait occurred

grok.verification_method: Live hooks captured from sanitized empty workspaces; raw payloads remained outside the repository. Re-probed on 2026-07-16 with Grok Build 0.2.101 for unobserved lifecycle hooks and subagent identity (#1299, #1300).

field_availability.transcript_path: present on prompt, tool, stop, and compact events; absent on SessionStart
field_availability.model: unavailable on every observed hook payload
field_availability.tool_result: present on PostToolUse; failed and denied reads are nested result variants
field_availability.failure_details: no top-level failure field observed; FileNotFound and PermissionDenied are nested PostToolUse result variants
field_availability.compact_summary: unavailable; compact hooks expose source and transcriptPath only
field_availability.subagent_parent_id: unavailable: Grok Build 0.2.101 still did not emit SubagentStart/SubagentStop hooks; subagents appear as spawn_subagent tool audits without a dedicated parent/child hook payload

SessionStart.note: source=new; no transcriptPath or model field

UserPromptSubmit.note: prompt, promptId, and transcriptPath are present

PostToolUse.note: Missing and sandbox-denied reads still emit PostToolUse with FileNotFound or PermissionDenied result variants.

PostToolUseFailure.note: Not emitted by missing-file probes on 0.2.99 or re-probe 0.2.101 (2026-07-16); FileNotFound arrived through PostToolUse.toolResult instead.

PermissionDenied.note: Standalone PermissionDenied hook still not observed on 0.2.101 re-probe; denials arrive as nested PostToolUse result variants when present.

Stop.note: Turn boundary with promptId, reason, and transcriptPath; no assistant body or model field.

StopFailure.note: No API failure was intentionally induced in the live probe.

SubagentStart.note: 2026-07-16 re-probe (Grok 0.2.101, plan mode): spawning a subagent used the spawn_subagent tool and produced PostToolUse audits only. No SubagentStart hook payload was delivered, so no parent/child identity contract is claimed and Traceary does not synthesize one.

SubagentStop.note: 2026-07-16 re-probe: no SubagentStop hook observed after spawn_subagent tool use. Parent/child enrichment remains unavailable.

Notification.note: Notification has no Traceary lifecycle mapping and was not included in the live contract probe.

PreCompact.note: Manual compact marker; no summary body is exposed.

PostCompact.note: Manual compact completion marker; no summary body is exposed.

SessionEnd.note: Not emitted on headless print completion in 0.2.99 or re-probe 0.2.101 (2026-07-16); Stop remains a turn boundary.
